titleStmt.title: SII 17.623: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 623. (A.R. No. 577 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Satyavāchakēśvara temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Pugaḻ śūḻnda puṉari, etc., of the king. Probably this is the original grant mentioned in No. 625 below and if so, though the date portion is lost here, it may be restored as the 26th year of the king's reign.

It seems to record the sale of land made tax-free to god Tirumaṇḍaḷi uḍaiya Mahādēva by the sabhā of Pandaṇainallūr, a brahmadēya in Tiruvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, receiving 4 kaḻañju and 8 mañjāḍi of gold equivalent to 8 kāśu from [Paṭ]ṭaśālichch[i] Śellūriṟ-Kāri Pavaḻakkuṉṟu alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira An[ṉad]āna Naṅgai, for the feeding of śivayōgis and tapasyar on New moon days.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koṭṭattu vikkiramatto putu maṇam puṇarntu matu varaiyiṭṭam varai karattuvāri A t toḷvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭāttik kirttiyai
niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉticait temaru makaḷ yāṭai nan ṉilappāvai tanimaiyuntavirntu punitattirumaṇimakuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat [ tonnilai] ventar cūṭi muṉṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Iru nila vaḷāka
m veṅkaṇuntantu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa O ruviṟ(ṟ) (puli) viḷaiyāṭa ttivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭuta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟ kiya tennavaṉ karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponna puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāṭ piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyeṉnuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉkai villetir koṭā vikkalaṉ kallatarna
ṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūrnaṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum veṅkaṇum (p)paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa taṉ mānamuṅka muṅkiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭai ṉ kaṭalun talaivirittalamarak kuṭa ticait taṉṉāḷukantu tāṉuntāṉaiyum paṉ nāḷiṭṭamum pala palamutukum payaṉ tetirmāṟa jayap peruntiruvum paḻiyuka kuṭutta pukaḻum celviyum vāḷara voṇkaṇ maṭantaya
riṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇameṉṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ k Aikkoḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu varuparittaraṅkamum poruparittalaṅkaḷum tan=tira vāriyu muṭai vaṭakaṭal teṉ kaṭal paṭarvatu polat taṉ peruñ ce lip pañcavaraiy varum poruta poṟkaḷat tañThese two letters are engraved one upon another.ci veruneḷit toṭi A
raṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭṭip paṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟi vijaiya [ stampam] ticai toṟu niṟutti muttiṉ calāpamum muttamiṭṭap potuvamum mattaveṅkari paṭumaiyyaccayyamum kaṉniyuṅkaikko teṉ nāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān ta nivicum peṟṟi māveṟiya taṉ varutanittalai
varaik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuppaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟaikoḷalai puṉaṟkaliṅka maṇṭalamum kaipaṭa talaṅkaḷum polaviramum tiyākamu viḷaṅkap pār to tumaiyeṉattin cintāmaṇi puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa kaṅkai viṟṟiruppa maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicai vallapi Eḻulakumuṭaiyāḷ
vāḻicai Irun=tinitiruppa Ū yum n=tirumālākattup piriyāteṉṟu n=tirumakaḷi ṭai viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirāja rāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku Āvatu keya māṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvāru(r)ṟ kūṟṟattu brahmateyam pan=ta
ṇanallūr sabhaikkamainta pāratā(ā)yan-raṇṇa nāraāyaṇaṉum pātāṇi nakkan kaṇṇaṉum pātāṇi nārāyaṇan kaṇṇaṉum pāratāyan mātavan poṟṟāyaṉum pāratāyaṉ kaṇ Ā ṭānamum pārattuvāci veṇkaru ta nama m Āritan Īcānatevan Iraviyum pātāṇi nāyanakkaṉum Ivvanaivom Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhai
yom Inṉāṭṭut tiruvārurt tirumaṇṭaḷi Uṭaiya ma[hā] leṟu manṟu cevikkum śivaśokiyaḷum tapasyarum Amutu ceyyavum Amāvāsitoṟum śivaśokiya m A ni cayya I� ka ṭacālicci cellūriṟ kāri pavaḻakkunṟāna nāṟpatteṇṇāyira Anṉatāna naṅkai tirumaṇ
ṭaḷi Uṭaiya mahādevar śrīpaṇṭārattu Iva kaḷai Āticaṇṭecuvaṟadevar pakkal koṇṭa Anṟāṭu naṟkācu Eṭṭu Ikkācu Eṭṭukkum tiruvārur nilaika ttu māṟṟup kku janmā poṉ Araikaḻaiñce mañcāṭiyāka kācu Eṭṭukkum pon nāṟkaḻaiñce Eṭṭumañcāṭiyu
ṅkoṇṭu tirumaṇṭaḷi Uṭaiya mahād[eva] tu Āti caṇḍe nāṅkaḷ koṇṭu ṟukkuṭuttu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta Eṅkaḷuril nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu kku catirattu meṟkaṭaiya puṅkaṉceyyeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilaṉ Araiye OThis inscription is damaged and incomplete. The following lines are engraved in a corner of the piece: 1 paṭṭacāllicci cellū[r*] kāri pavaḻakkunṟu ce 2 ta muḻakkal[lai] iraṇṭu.
Digital edition of SII 17.623 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
